title: Notification regarding State of Tamil Nadu V/s State of Kerala under ISRWDA dated 30/04/2010

Mafim$m 'zute’nh'hpgitmm (I) wa mammawwmm haw Wit mm$nmmmnam‘mfim W6MWM$ Mhmwwmmwma’wwm amwwww¢wmm mgm$kmwmmgm EM wmmmnfiwgmgamm ‘mtzitegaglmmmfiplflsgm‘w~mhp um: 1112;333:1319 p. mm m2 010??“ mm WUIOPZ-Slwflwwkmifli 211219— tame—v ' aLLimozLamngammgamwlwg mmmwwiflekee ‘ne'ue {moz‘agra 09 mag :a W mmm ZCGI -‘0I VHxvswA/oloz ‘09 1mu‘xvama‘1n'laa mm zest ‘OL mtg/mo: ‘09 age ‘M ‘Mgk iLZfi 'ON [Ale 1: “momv MI (magnum mam @- W (l!) uognas-qns—i “09399—11 Lqu (H) Emma—1 EAR—II hm. ‘ mvmauovmxa m3? 0110119.?J0Waive)2% m . 66/VOOEi-Olah mafia 12mp- -- 1 of 2 -- N / THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART lI—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF WATER RESOURCES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th April, 2010 SO. 992(E).~Whereas in the matter ofHOriginalv Suit No. 3 or 2006 between State of Tamil Nadu'Vs. State ofKerala, the Hon’ble Supreme Court vide its orders dated 18-2—20 1 0 and 29-3-2010 directed the Central Government of set up by notification in the Official Gazette, an Empowered Committee comprising of Hon’ble Dr. A. S. Anand, Former Chief Justice of India as the Chairman, One member each to be nominated by the State of Tamil Nadu and Kerala in consultation with the Chairman and two technical experts not connected With the dispute to be nominated by the Central Government in consultation with the Chairman; Now, therefore, for implementing the said directions of the Supreme Court , the Central Govememnt hereby constitutes the empowered Committee comprising of the following :77 __ ‘ - (i) Justice Dr. A. S. Anand, Former ChiefJustice of India (ii) Justice Sh. K.T. Thomas, Former Judge of Supreme Court, (Nominated by Kerala Government) (iii) Justice Dr. A. R. Lakshmanan. Former Judge of Supreme Court, (Nominated by Tamil Nadu Governtnent‘)‘ (iv) Dr. C. D. Thatte, Former Secretary, Union Ministry of Water Resources, (Technical Expert nominated by Central Government)- —Chairman t '--Member »"Member —Member (t!) Sh. D. K. Mehta, . ~Mcmber Former Chief Engineer, Central. Water Commission (Technical Expert nominated by Central Government) (vi) Sh. Sat Pal, ' JointSecretary," Union Minstry of Water Resources / . » . —Member Secretary 2. Remuneration and other allowances payable to and terms and conditions thereof as also the matters connected therewith ofChairman, Members and Mcmebcr- Secretary of the Empowered Committee, shall be issued separately. 3. The Ileadquarter ofthe Committee shall be at New Delhi. 4. The empowered committee shall hear to the parties to the suit on all issues that will be raised before them without being limited to issues that have been raised before Hon’ble Supreme Court and furnish a report, as far as possible, within six months from their constitution. 5. The Committee shall frame its own procedure and issue appropriate directions as to the hearing as well as venue of its sittings. 6. The legal and constitutional issues including the validity of the Kerala Irrigation and Water Conservation (Amendment) Act, 2006 would be considered by the Hon’ble Supreme Coun as per Supreme Court Order dated 18th February,20l0. lF.No. ll/Z/ZOIO-BM] . U. N. PANJIAR. Secy. I Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
